title: doratoxylon diversifolium
intro: Doratoxylon diversifolium, also known as the "sawtooth tree," is a plant species native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Doratoxylon diversifolium include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its use in treating respiratory and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into tea or tincture, or used as a powder or ointment for topical application.
